title: Silence skulk sensor
description: Silance skulk sensor mutes all skulk sensor blocks sounds in minecraft 1.19+
body:
This resource pack for Minecraft 1.19+ is made to completely mute all sounds of the Sculk Sensor block.
If you are tired of the strange and constant noise of sculk sensors, this pack is the best choice for you. Just drop it into your resourcepacks folder and activate it.

📌 Features:

All sculk sensor sounds such as place, break, step, hit, and even vibration are silenced.

Lightweight and small ⚡

No mods or extra installation needed 🚀

Tested on Minecraft 1.19+ and above ✅


❓ Why this pack?
Very often in servers or singleplayer worlds, the repetitive sculk sensor sounds can be annoying. This pack was created to make the game environment calmer so you can focus more on gameplay.

👨‍💻 Made with love By AmirMiner❤️



_👉 Note: This resource pack does not affect sculk shriekers. Their sounds remain unchanged._
